narms_now.name: NARMS Now: Human Data - Antimicrobial Resistance
narms_now.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
narms_now.description: Antimicrobial resistance data from NARMS human clinical isolates, including resistance by individual agent and by multi-drug resistance pattern. Data from the NARMS Now Power BI dashboard.
narms_now.restrictions: Public domain. CDC data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

narms_retail_meats.name: FDA NARMS Retail Meats Surveillance Data
narms_retail_meats.description: Isolate-level antimicrobial susceptibility data from the FDA NARMS retail meats program. State-level sampling from retail stores.
narms_retail_meats.restrictions: Public domain. FDA data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

narms_animal_pathogen.name: FDA NARMS Animal Pathogen Surveillance Data
narms_animal_pathogen.description: Antimicrobial susceptibility data from veterinary diagnostic laboratories. State-level data.
narms_animal_pathogen.restrictions: Public domain. FDA data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

narms_food_animals.name: FDA NARMS Food-Producing Animals Surveillance Data
narms_food_animals.description: Isolate-level data from HACCP slaughter surveillance, cecal sampling, and minor species programs. National-level only.
narms_food_animals.restrictions: Public domain. FDA data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
